message:
feat(wezterm+sharding): WeztermInterface kill/zoom _with_cx trait extensions (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Follow-on to tick 44: extend the `WeztermInterface` trait with
Cx-first `kill_pane` and `zoom_pane` entry points, wire all 4 impl
sites.

Additions (strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `WeztermInterface::kill_pane_with_cx` trait default — delegates
    to `self.kill_pane(pane_id)`.

  * `WeztermInterface::zoom_pane_with_cx` trait default — delegates
    to `self.zoom_pane(pane_id, zoom)`.

  * Override on `impl WeztermInterface for WeztermClient` for both —
    routes to the inherent `_with_cx` methods landed in tick 41.

  * Override on `impl WeztermInterface for Arc<dyn WeztermInterface>`
    for both — forwards `cx` through `self.as_ref()`.

  * Override on `impl WeztermInterface for UnifiedClient` for both —
    forwards through `self.inner`.

  * Override on `impl WeztermInterface for ShardedWeztermClient`
    (sharding.rs) for both — routes pane_id through
    `route_for_global_pane_id_with_cx` then dispatches to
    `backend.handle.{kill_pane,zoom_pane}_with_cx` with the existing
    `backend_error` wrapping.

Regression tests (new, parallel to tick 44's activate pattern):

  * `kill_pane_with_cx_forwards_through_arc_and_unified` — exercises
    Arc<dyn WeztermInterface> and UnifiedClient wrappers; asserts
    SocketNotFound short-circuit from the concrete WeztermClient
    `kill_pane_with_cx`.

  * `zoom_pane_with_cx_forwards_through_arc_and_unified` — exercises
    the same wrappers for BOTH zoom=true and zoom=false (--unzoom)
    branches on Arc<dyn>, plus UnifiedClient for zoom=true. If either
    the wrapper override or the branch selection regressed on the Cx
    path, the test would fail with a different error variant.

Pane-lifecycle Cx-first trait-extension coverage after tick 45:
  * `activate_pane_with_cx` ✓ (tick 44)
  * `kill_pane_with_cx`     ✓ (tick 45, this commit)
  * `zoom_pane_with_cx`     ✓ (tick 45, this commit)
  * `spawn_with_cx`          pending
  * `spawn_targeted_with_cx` pending
  * `split_pane_with_cx`     pending

Verification (local fork bypass):
  * wezterm:: — 169 passed / 0 failed (tick 44: 167 -> tick 45: 169,
    +2 new tests)
  * sharding:: — 95 passed / 0 failed (unchanged count, new kill_pane
    + zoom_pane overrides compile + all existing tests still green)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
